cleavage agent: digested overnight at 37 °C in mass spectrometry grade trypsin
collision energy: fragmented by a higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) workflow at 30 collision energy
fragmentation method: fragmented by a higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) workflow
instrument: mass spectrometric analysis was performed on a Thermo Fisher Scientific™ Orbitrap Fusion™ Tribrid™ mass spectrometer
labeling: mass spectrometric analysis of cerebellum isolated from H135Q+/+ and H135Qm/m mice.
reduction reagent: 5 mM Tris (2-carboxyethyl) phosphine hydrochloride (TCEP, cat# C4706, Sigma-Aldrich)
reduction concentration: 5 mM Tris (2-carboxyethyl) phosphine hydrochloride (TCEP, cat# C4706, Sigma-Aldrich)
